api_key.description: Marketstack API access key, sent as the access_key query parameter. Never logged.

base_url.description: Marketstack API base URL override for tests or proxies.

symbols.description: Comma-separated ticker symbols; sent as the symbols query param on eod/splits/dividends streams. No default: when unset, those endpoints are queried without a symbol filter (matches legacy, which sends no symbols param when config symbols is unset).

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound truncated to YYYY-MM-DD; sent as date_from on eod/splits/dividends streams.
